creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #17)

I had try 1.9.6, there is broken OSS (crash with division by zero), looks like they change API and do not update OSS code.

If FreeBSD foundation will sponsor this I can refactor OSS and update this port, but looks like they ignore me and do not respond even for CoC emails :)
